name: Granny's Peaches & Cream Cobbler %%% Drnd29a
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Peel and slice peaches.
3. In a large bowl, stir together all filling ingredients except peaches. Stir in peaches.
4. Pour the mixture into a 13 x 9 inch pan.
5. In a medium bowl, stir together all cobble ingredients except butter, egg, and milk.
6. Cut in butter until crumbly.
7. Stir in egg and milk just until moistened.
8. Crumble mixture over peaches; sprinkle with 3 tablespoons sugar.
9. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes or until golden brown and bubbly around edges.
10. Serve with whipped cream or vanilla ice cream.
